name: Beef Stroganoff...russian Style
recipeIngredient: 1 lb sirloin steak, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat the beef strips with 1 tablespoon flour and salt.
2. Brown the beef strips quickly in 1 tablespoon butter in a skillet.
3. Add mushrooms, onion, and garlic; cook until the onion is crisp-tender, about 3 to 4 minutes.
4. Remove the meat and mushrooms from the pan.
5. Add 2 tablespoons butter to the pan drippings; blend in 1 tablespoon flour.
6. Add tomato paste. Stir in broth.
7. Stir over medium heat until thick and bubbly. Return the meat and mushrooms to the skillet.
8. Stir in sour cream; cook slowly until heated through. Do not boil.
9. Serve over hot buttered noodles. Makes 4-5 servings.
